name: grow-product-manager
description: AI assistant for Product Managers: research, concepts, requirements, brainstorming, task creation, data analysis, CJM research with funnel anomaly detection, hypothesis generation, knowledge library, multilingual artifact templates, and design-bridge (Prom DS-themed decks, prototypes, handoffs, research enrichment, WCAG 2.1 AA a11y gates) — integrated with Jira, Confluence, Figma, and Tableau.
